title: crataegus crus-galli var. danielsii
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. danielsii, also known as the Daniels hawthorn, is a variety of the common hawthorn tree, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The Daniels hawthorn is rich in flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins, which have been shown to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of heart disease. The herbal preparations of Crataegus crus-galli var. danielsii include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
